query:
SELECT 
  a.id,
  a.demandId,
  a.scheduledStart,
  a.scheduledEnd,
  a.scheduledHours,
  d.date,
  d.startTime,
  d.endTime
FROM assignments a
JOIN demands d ON a.demandId = d.id
WHERE a.workerId = 330087 
  AND a.scheduledHours < 0
ORDER BY a.id;
